title: alangium chinense var. tomentosum
intro: Alangium chinense var. tomentosum, also known as the Chinese alangium or tomentose alangium, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and alkaloids. The health benefits of Alangium chinense var. tomentosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
